---
title: CV/Resume
---
<!-- LEFT COLUMN -->
<div class="left-image-column">
  <img src="/images/nature.webp">
  <img src="/images/haleakala.webp">
  <img src="/images/grandcanyon.webp">
</div>

<!-- RIGHT COLUMN -->
<div class="second-image-column"></div>

[📄 Download my CV/Resume (PDF)](cv_build/CV.pdf)
